title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at CarDekho

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at CarDekho
jsonLd.description:
CarDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Nashik location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About CarDekho:
CarDekho is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho!
